But for DateTimeZoneCutover tests, since they deal with time zones and DST transitions, changing the formatting of the offset in this way doesn't affect their logic or calculations. Thus, these tests remain failing because the underlying issues (like incorrect offset values during DST changes) aren't addressed by the mutation.

Therefore, the mutant code change only fixes the TestMonthDay_Properties test but doesn't resolve the other failing tests related to DateTimeZoneCutover.
